title: Struct contract — drive a multi-field, nested-struct payload end to end (RFC 0010 / DF-27)
description: serviceProviderSet drives a GridDemand wire struct (a bool, an enum-by-name, and a 1-level nested PowerLimits struct) into GridBlock through the real generic contract path. The block observes it and surfaces every field — including the nested ones — as service properties, asserted with expect. The non-HAL case the four old HAL step kinds could never address.

steps.label: drive the grid demand (nested struct payload)
wait until the block observes the demand
the enum field deserialized by name
a nested-struct field reached the block
the other nested-struct field reached the block
